              "     <output id=\"result-531a32a8-2feb-4cdf-a8a8-99b2348959e1\">\n",
              "      Upload widget is only available when the cell has been executed in the\n",
              "      current browser session. Please rerun this cell to enable.\n",
              "      </output>\n",
              "      <script>// Copyright 2017 Google LLC\n",
              "//\n",
              "// Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n",
              "// you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n",
              "// You may obtain a copy of the License at\n",
              "//\n",
              "//      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n",
              "//\n",
              "// Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n",
              "// distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n",
              "// WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n",
              "// See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n",
              "// limitations under the License.\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * @fileoverview Helpers for google.colab Python module.\n",
              " */\n",
              "(function(scope) {\n",
              "function span(text, styleAttributes = {}) {\n",
              "  const element = document.createElement('span');\n",
              "  element.textContent = text;\n",
              "  for (const key of Object.keys(styleAttributes)) {\n",
              "    element.style[key] = styleAttributes[key];\n",
              "  }\n",
              "  return element;\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// Max number of bytes which will be uploaded at a time.\n",
              "const MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE = 100 * 1024;\n",
              "\n",
              "function _uploadFiles(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const steps = uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId);\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  // Cache steps on the outputElement to make it available for the next call\n",
              "  // to uploadFilesContinue from Python.\n",
              "  outputElement.steps = steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  return _uploadFilesContinue(outputId);\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "// This is roughly an async generator (not supported in the browser yet),\n",
              "// where there are multiple asynchronous steps and the Python side is going\n",
              "// to poll for completion of each step.\n",
              "// This uses a Promise to block the python side on completion of each step,\n",
              "// then passes the result of the previous step as the input to the next step.\n",
              "function _uploadFilesContinue(outputId) {\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  const steps = outputElement.steps;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const next = steps.next(outputElement.lastPromiseValue);\n",
              "  return Promise.resolve(next.value.promise).then((value) => {\n",
              "    // Cache the last promise value to make it available to the next\n",
              "    // step of the generator.\n",
              "    outputElement.lastPromiseValue = value;\n",
              "    return next.value.response;\n",
              "  });\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "/**\n",
              " * Generator function which is called between each async step of the upload\n",
              " * process.\n",
              " * @param {string} inputId Element ID of the input file picker element.\n",
              " * @param {string} outputId Element ID of the output display.\n",
              " * @return {!Iterable<!Object>} Iterable of next steps.\n",
              " */\n",
              "function* uploadFilesStep(inputId, outputId) {\n",
              "  const inputElement = document.getElementById(inputId);\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = false;\n",
              "\n",
              "  const outputElement = document.getElementById(outputId);\n",
              "  outputElement.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "\n",
              "  const pickedPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    inputElement.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n",
              "      resolve(e.target.files);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  const cancel = document.createElement('button');\n",
              "  inputElement.parentElement.appendChild(cancel);\n",
              "  cancel.textContent = 'Cancel upload';\n",
              "  const cancelPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "    cancel.onclick = () => {\n",
              "      resolve(null);\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  });\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Wait for the user to pick the files.\n",
              "  const files = yield {\n",
              "    promise: Promise.race([pickedPromise, cancelPromise]),\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'starting',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "\n",
              "  cancel.remove();\n",
              "\n",
              "  // Disable the input element since further picks are not allowed.\n",
              "  inputElement.disabled = true;\n",
              "\n",
              "  if (!files) {\n",
              "    return {\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'complete',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  for (const file of files) {\n",
              "    const li = document.createElement('li');\n",
              "    li.append(span(file.name, {fontWeight: 'bold'}));\n",
              "    li.append(span(\n",
              "        `(${file.type || 'n/a'}) - ${file.size} bytes, ` +\n",
              "        `last modified: ${\n",
              "            file.lastModifiedDate ? file.lastModifiedDate.toLocaleDateString() :\n",
              "                                    'n/a'} - `));\n",
              "    const percent = span('0% done');\n",
              "    li.appendChild(percent);\n",
              "\n",
              "    outputElement.appendChild(li);\n",
              "\n",
              "    const fileDataPromise = new Promise((resolve) => {\n",
              "      const reader = new FileReader();\n",
              "      reader.onload = (e) => {\n",
              "        resolve(e.target.result);\n",
              "      };\n",
              "      reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);\n",
              "    });\n",
              "    // Wait for the data to be ready.\n",
              "    let fileData = yield {\n",
              "      promise: fileDataPromise,\n",
              "      response: {\n",
              "        action: 'continue',\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    };\n",
              "\n",
              "    // Use a chunked sending to avoid message size limits. See b/62115660.\n",
              "    let position = 0;\n",
              "    do {\n",
              "      const length = Math.min(fileData.byteLength - position, MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE);\n",
              "      const chunk = new Uint8Array(fileData, position, length);\n",
              "      position += length;\n",
              "\n",
              "      const base64 = btoa(String.fromCharCode.apply(null, chunk));\n",
              "      yield {\n",
              "        response: {\n",
              "          action: 'append',\n",
              "          file: file.name,\n",
              "          data: base64,\n",
              "        },\n",
              "      };\n",
              "\n",
              "      let percentDone = fileData.byteLength === 0 ?\n",
              "          100 :\n",
              "          Math.round((position / fileData.byteLength) * 100);\n",
              "      percent.textContent = `${percentDone}% done`;\n",
              "\n",
              "    } while (position < fileData.byteLength);\n",
              "  }\n",
              "\n",
              "  // All done.\n",
              "  yield {\n",
              "    response: {\n",
              "      action: 'complete',\n",
              "    }\n",
              "  };\n",
              "}\n",
              "\n",
              "scope.google = scope.google || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab = scope.google.colab || {};\n",
              "scope.google.colab._files = {\n",
              "  _uploadFiles,\n",
              "  _uploadFilesContinue,\n",
              "};\n",
              "})(self);\n",
              "</script> "
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {}
        },
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Saving kaggle (2).json to kaggle (2).json\n"
          ]
        }
      ]

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 12: CREATE MASTER IMAGE DATAFRAME\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "VALID_EXTENSIONS = {\".jpeg\", \".jpg\", \".png\"}\n",
        "\n",
        "records = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for original_split in [\"train\", \"val\", \"test\"]:\n",
        "    split_path = DATA_ROOT / original_split\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not split_path.exists():\n",
        "        continue\n",
        "\n",
        "    for class_name in [\"NORMAL\", \"PNEUMONIA\"]:\n",
        "        class_path = split_path / class_name\n",
        "\n",
        "        if not class_path.exists():\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        for image_path in class_path.iterdir():\n",
        "            if image_path.suffix.lower() in VALID_EXTENSIONS:\n",
        "\n",
        "                filename = image_path.name\n",
        "\n",
        "                # Typical filenames contain patient identifiers such as:\n",
        "                # person123_bacteria_456.jpeg\n",
        "                patient_match = re.search(\n",
        "                    r\"(person\\d+)\",\n",
        "                    filename.lower()\n",
        "                )\n",
        "\n",
        "                if patient_match:\n",
        "                    patient_id = patient_match.group(1)\n",
        "                else:\n",
        "                    # Normal filenames may have IDs such as NORMAL2-IM-0001\n",
        "                    patient_id = re.sub(\n",
        "                        r\"[^a-zA-Z0-9]\",\n",
        "                        \"_\",\n",
        "                        image_path.stem\n",
        "                    )\n",
        "\n",
        "                records.append({\n",
        "                    \"filepath\": str(image_path),\n",
        "                    \"filename\": filename,\n",
        "                    \"label_name\": class_name,\n",
        "                    \"label\": 1 if class_name == \"PNEUMONIA\" else 0,\n",
        "                    \"patient_id\": patient_id,\n",
        "                    \"original_split\": original_split\n",
        "                })\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame(records)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Total images:\", len(df))\n",
        "print(df.head())\n",
        "print(\"\\nClass distribution:\")\n",
        "print(df[\"label_name\"].value_counts())\n"
      ],

        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 13: CHECK FOR CORRUPTED OR UNREADABLE IMAGES\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "from PIL import Image\n",
        "from tqdm.auto import tqdm\n",
        "\n",
        "valid_rows = []\n",
        "corrupt_files = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for index, row in tqdm(\n",
        "    df.iterrows(),\n",
        "    total=len(df),\n",
        "    desc=\"Checking images\"\n",
        "):\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        with Image.open(row[\"filepath\"]) as image:\n",
        "            image.verify()\n",
        "\n",
        "        valid_rows.append(index)\n",
        "\n",
        "    except Exception as error:\n",
        "        corrupt_files.append({\n",
        "            \"filepath\": row[\"filepath\"],\n",
        "            \"error\": str(error)\n",
        "        })\n",
        "\n",
        "df = df.loc[valid_rows].reset_index(drop=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Valid images:\", len(df))\n",
        "print(\"Corrupt images:\", len(corrupt_files))\n",
        "\n",
        "if corrupt_files:\n",
        "    corrupt_df = pd.DataFrame(corrupt_files)\n",
        "    corrupt_df.to_csv(\n",
        "        TABLE_DIR / \"corrupt_images.csv\",\n",
        "        index=False\n",
        "    )\n"

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 16: PATIENT-AWARE TRAIN/VALIDATION/TEST SPLIT\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "# First split: 70% train and 30% temporary\n",
        "group_split_1 = GroupShuffleSplit(\n",
        "    n_splits=1,\n",
        "    train_size=0.70,\n",
        "    random_state=SEED\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "train_indices, temp_indices = next(\n",
        "    group_split_1.split(\n",
        "        df,\n",
        "        y=df[\"label\"],\n",
        "        groups=df[\"patient_id\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "train_df = df.iloc[train_indices].copy()\n",
        "temp_df = df.iloc[temp_indices].copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Second split: divide temporary set equally into validation/test\n",
        "group_split_2 = GroupShuffleSplit(\n",
        "    n_splits=1,\n",
        "    train_size=0.50,\n",
        "    random_state=SEED\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "val_relative_indices, test_relative_indices = next(\n",
        "    group_split_2.split(\n",
        "        temp_df,\n",
        "        y=temp_df[\"label\"],\n",
        "        groups=temp_df[\"patient_id\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "val_df = temp_df.iloc[val_relative_indices].copy()\n",
        "test_df = temp_df.iloc[test_relative_indices].copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "train_df = train_df.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
        "val_df = val_df.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
        "test_df = test_df.reset_index(drop=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Training images:\", len(train_df))\n",
        "print(\"Validation images:\", len(val_df))\n",
        "print(\"Testing images:\", len(test_df))\n"
      ],

        "# CELL 17: TRAINING CONFIGURATION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "IMG_HEIGHT = 224\n",
        "IMG_WIDTH = 224\n",
        "IMAGE_SIZE = (IMG_HEIGHT, IMG_WIDTH)\n",
        "\n",
        "BATCH_SIZE = 16\n",
        "\n",
        "HEAD_EPOCHS = 10\n",
        "FINE_TUNE_EPOCHS = 15\n",
        "\n",
        "AUTOTUNE = tf.data.AUTOTUNE\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Image size:\", IMAGE_SIZE)\n",
        "print(\"Batch size:\", BATCH_SIZE)\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "MCko9fH_z3B2",
        "outputId": "5c52264a-c312-4443-fbcb-ef340d8108fa"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Image size: (224, 224)\n",
            "Batch size: 16\n"
          ]
        }
      ]

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 18: CREATE TF.DATA PIPELINE\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def load_xray(filepath, label):\n",
        "\n",
        "    image_bytes = tf.io.read_file(filepath)\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.io.decode_image(\n",
        "        image_bytes,\n",
        "        channels=3,\n",
        "        expand_animations=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image.set_shape([None, None, 3])\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.image.resize(\n",
        "        image,\n",
        "        [IMG_HEIGHT, IMG_WIDTH],\n",
        "        antialias=True\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.cast(image, tf.float32)\n",
        "    label = tf.cast(label, tf.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return image, label\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def create_dataset(dataframe, training=False):\n",
        "\n",
        "    filepaths = dataframe[\"filepath\"].values\n",
        "    labels = dataframe[\"label\"].values.astype(np.float32)\n",
        "\n",
        "    dataset = tf.data.Dataset.from_tensor_slices(\n",
        "        (filepaths, labels)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    if training:\n",
        "        dataset = dataset.shuffle(\n",
        "            buffer_size=len(dataframe),\n",
        "            seed=SEED,\n",
        "            reshuffle_each_iteration=True\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    dataset = dataset.map(\n",
        "        load_xray,\n",
        "        num_parallel_calls=AUTOTUNE\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    dataset = dataset.batch(\n",
        "        BATCH_SIZE,\n",
        "        drop_remainder=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    dataset = dataset.prefetch(AUTOTUNE)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return dataset\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "train_ds = create_dataset(\n",
        "    train_df,\n",
        "    training=True\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "val_ds = create_dataset(\n",
        "    val_df,\n",
        "    training=False\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "test_ds = create_dataset(\n",
        "    test_df,\n",
        "    training=False\n",
        ")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "YvcfROK7z-fU"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 19: DATA AUGMENTATION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "data_augmentation = keras.Sequential(\n",
        "    [\n",
        "        layers.RandomFlip(\n",
        "            mode=\"horizontal\",\n",
        "            seed=SEED\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        layers.RandomRotation(\n",
        "            factor=0.03,\n",
        "            fill_mode=\"nearest\",\n",
        "            seed=SEED\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        layers.RandomZoom(\n",
        "            height_factor=(-0.05, 0.05),\n",
        "            width_factor=(-0.05, 0.05),\n",
        "            fill_mode=\"nearest\",\n",
        "            seed=SEED\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        layers.RandomTranslation(\n",
        "            height_factor=0.03,\n",
        "            width_factor=0.03,\n",
        "            fill_mode=\"nearest\",\n",
        "            seed=SEED\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        layers.RandomContrast(\n",
        "            factor=0.10,\n",
        "            seed=SEED\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    ],\n",
        "    name=\"medical_image_augmentation\"\n",
        ")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "IDv5Xy_A0IqS"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {

        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 21: TRAINING METRICS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def get_training_metrics():\n",
        "    return [\n",
        "        keras.metrics.BinaryAccuracy(\n",
        "            name=\"accuracy\",\n",
        "            threshold=0.5\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        keras.metrics.Precision(\n",
        "            name=\"precision\",\n",
        "            thresholds=0.5\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        keras.metrics.Recall(\n",
        "            name=\"sensitivity\",\n",
        "            thresholds=0.5\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        keras.metrics.AUC(\n",
        "            name=\"roc_auc\",\n",
        "            curve=\"ROC\"\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        keras.metrics.AUC(\n",
        "            name=\"pr_auc\",\n",
        "            curve=\"PR\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    ]\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "WepMygVZ0VjU"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 22: GENERIC TRANSFER-LEARNING MODEL BUILDER\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def build_transfer_model(\n",
        "    architecture_name,\n",
        "    input_shape=(224, 224, 3),\n",
        "    dropout_rate=0.40\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    inputs = keras.Input(\n",
        "        shape=input_shape,\n",
        "        name=\"chest_xray_input\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = data_augmentation(inputs)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if architecture_name == \"DenseNet121\":\n",
        "\n",
        "        x = layers.Lambda(\n",
        "            densenet_preprocess,\n",
        "            name=\"densenet_preprocessing\"\n",
        "        )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "        base_model = DenseNet121(\n",
        "            weights=\"imagenet\",\n",
        "            include_top=False,\n",
        "            input_shape=input_shape\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    elif architecture_name == \"ResNet50\":\n",
        "\n",
        "        x = layers.Lambda(\n",
        "            resnet_preprocess,\n",
        "            name=\"resnet_preprocessing\"\n",
        "        )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "        base_model = ResNet50(\n",
        "            weights=\"imagenet\",\n",
        "            include_top=False,\n",
        "            input_shape=input_shape\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    elif architecture_name == \"EfficientNetB0\":\n",
        "\n",
        "        x = layers.Lambda(\n",
        "            efficientnet_preprocess,\n",
        "            name=\"efficientnet_preprocessing\"\n",
        "        )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "        base_model = EfficientNetB0(\n",
        "            weights=\"imagenet\",\n",
        "            include_top=False,\n",
        "            input_shape=input_shape\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        raise ValueError(\n",
        "            f\"Unsupported architecture: {architecture_name}\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    base_model.trainable = False\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = base_model(\n",
        "        x,\n",
        "        training=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = layers.GlobalAveragePooling2D(\n",
        "        name=\"global_average_pooling\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = layers.BatchNormalization(\n",
        "        name=\"head_batch_normalization\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = layers.Dropout(\n",
        "        dropout_rate,\n",
        "        name=\"head_dropout\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = layers.Dense(\n",
        "        256,\n",
        "        activation=\"relu\",\n",
        "        kernel_regularizer=keras.regularizers.l2(1e-4),\n",
        "        name=\"head_dense\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    x = layers.Dropout(\n",
        "        dropout_rate / 2,\n",
        "        name=\"head_dropout_2\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    output = layers.Dense(\n",
        "        1,\n",
        "        activation=\"sigmoid\",\n",
        "        dtype=\"float32\",\n",
        "        name=\"pneumonia_probability\"\n",
        "    )(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = keras.Model(\n",
        "        inputs=inputs,\n",
        "        outputs=output,\n",
        "        name=f\"{architecture_name}_Pneumonia\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.base_model = base_model\n",
        "\n",
        "    return model\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "ZAjq85ek0ZWH"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 23: CALLBACK FACTORY\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def create_callbacks(model_name, training_stage):\n",
        "\n",
        "    checkpoint_path = (\n",
        "        MODEL_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{model_name}_{training_stage}_best.keras\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    csv_path = (\n",
        "        LOG_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{model_name}_{training_stage}_history.csv\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    callbacks = [\n",
        "        ModelCheckpoint(\n",
        "            filepath=str(checkpoint_path),\n",
        "            monitor=\"val_roc_auc\",\n",
        "            mode=\"max\",\n",
        "            save_best_only=True,\n",
        "            verbose=1\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        EarlyStopping(\n",
        "            monitor=\"val_roc_auc\",\n",
        "            mode=\"max\",\n",
        "            patience=5,\n",
        "            restore_best_weights=True,\n",
        "            verbose=1\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        ReduceLROnPlateau(\n",
        "            monitor=\"val_loss\",\n",
        "            mode=\"min\",\n",
        "            factor=0.2,\n",
        "            patience=2,\n",
        "            min_lr=1e-7,\n",
        "            verbose=1\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        CSVLogger(\n",
        "            filename=str(csv_path),\n",
        "            append=False\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        TerminateOnNaN()\n",
        "    ]\n",
        "\n",
        "    return callbacks\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "7I4wmiJI0ZFy"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 24: COMPILE MODEL\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def compile_model(model, learning_rate):\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.compile(\n",
        "        optimizer=keras.optimizers.Adam(\n",
        "            learning_rate=learning_rate\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "\n",
        "        loss=keras.losses.BinaryCrossentropy(),\n",
        "\n",
        "        metrics=get_training_metrics()\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return model\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "y-7NRcSK0iKZ"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 25: UNFREEZE TOP PORTION OF BASE MODEL\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def prepare_for_fine_tuning(\n",
        "    model,\n",
        "    unfreeze_fraction=0.20\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    base_model = model.base_model\n",
        "    base_model.trainable = True\n",
        "\n",
        "    total_layers = len(base_model.layers)\n",
        "\n",
        "    freeze_until = int(\n",
        "        total_layers * (1.0 - unfreeze_fraction)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    for layer in base_model.layers[:freeze_until]:\n",
        "        layer.trainable = False\n",
        "\n",
        "    for layer in base_model.layers[freeze_until:]:\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Keep Batch Normalization frozen for stable fine-tuning\n",
        "        if isinstance(\n",
        "            layer,\n",
        "            layers.BatchNormalization\n",
        "        ):\n",
        "            layer.trainable = False\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            layer.trainable = True\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Total base layers:\", total_layers)\n",
        "    print(\"Unfreeze begins at layer:\", freeze_until)\n",
        "    print(\n",
        "        \"Trainable base layers:\",\n",
        "        sum(layer.trainable for layer in base_model.layers)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return model\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "aKcDmqXL0muF"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 26: COMPLETE TWO-PHASE TRAINING FUNCTION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def train_architecture(\n",
        "    architecture_name,\n",
        "    head_epochs=HEAD_EPOCHS,\n",
        "    fine_tune_epochs=FINE_TUNE_EPOCHS,\n",
        "    unfreeze_fraction=0.20\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\n\")\n",
        "    print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "    print(\"TRAINING:\", architecture_name)\n",
        "    print(\"=\" * 80)\n",
        "\n",
        "    tf.keras.backend.clear_session()\n",
        "    gc.collect()\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = build_transfer_model(\n",
        "        architecture_name=architecture_name\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = compile_model(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        learning_rate=1e-3\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\nPhase 1: Training classification head\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    head_history = model.fit(\n",
        "        train_ds,\n",
        "        validation_data=val_ds,\n",
        "        epochs=head_epochs,\n",
        "        class_weight=CLASS_WEIGHTS,\n",
        "        callbacks=create_callbacks(\n",
        "            architecture_name,\n",
        "            \"head\"\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        verbose=1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\nPhase 2: Fine-tuning top convolutional layers\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = prepare_for_fine_tuning(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        unfreeze_fraction=unfreeze_fraction\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = compile_model(\n",
        "        model,\n",
        "        learning_rate=1e-5\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    initial_epoch = len(\n",
        "        head_history.history[\"loss\"]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    fine_history = model.fit(\n",
        "        train_ds,\n",
        "        validation_data=val_ds,\n",
        "        initial_epoch=initial_epoch,\n",
        "        epochs=initial_epoch + fine_tune_epochs,\n",
        "        class_weight=CLASS_WEIGHTS,\n",
        "        callbacks=create_callbacks(\n",
        "            architecture_name,\n",
        "            \"finetuned\"\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        verbose=1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    final_path = (\n",
        "        MODEL_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{architecture_name}_final.keras\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.save(final_path)\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Final model saved to:\", final_path)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return model, head_history, fine_history\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "o1DHApGZ0sLw"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 33: LOAD AND PLOT SAVED TRAINING LOGS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def load_combined_history(model_name):\n",
        "\n",
        "    head_path = LOG_DIR / f\"{model_name}_head_history.csv\"\n",
        "    fine_path = LOG_DIR / f\"{model_name}_finetuned_history.csv\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    histories = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    if head_path.exists():\n",
        "        head_df = pd.read_csv(head_path)\n",
        "        head_df[\"stage\"] = \"Frozen backbone\"\n",
        "        histories.append(head_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if fine_path.exists():\n",
        "        fine_df = pd.read_csv(fine_path)\n",
        "        fine_df[\"stage\"] = \"Fine-tuning\"\n",
        "        histories.append(fine_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not histories:\n",
        "        return None\n",
        "\n",
        "    history_df = pd.concat(\n",
        "        histories,\n",
        "        ignore_index=True\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    history_df[\"epoch_number\"] = (\n",
        "        np.arange(len(history_df)) + 1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return history_df\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def plot_training_history(model_name):\n",
        "\n",
        "    history_df = load_combined_history(model_name)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if history_df is None:\n",
        "        print(\"No logs found for\", model_name)\n",
        "        return\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(\n",
        "        1,\n",
        "        3,\n",
        "        figsize=(18, 5)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[0].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"loss\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Training\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[0].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"val_loss\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Validation\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[0].set_title(f\"{model_name}: Loss\")\n",
        "    axes[0].set_xlabel(\"Epoch\")\n",
        "    axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Binary cross-entropy\")\n",
        "    axes[0].legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[1].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"accuracy\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Training\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[1].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"val_accuracy\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Validation\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[1].set_title(f\"{model_name}: Accuracy\")\n",
        "    axes[1].set_xlabel(\"Epoch\")\n",
        "    axes[1].set_ylabel(\"Accuracy\")\n",
        "    axes[1].legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[2].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"roc_auc\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Training\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[2].plot(\n",
        "        history_df[\"epoch_number\"],\n",
        "        history_df[\"val_roc_auc\"],\n",
        "        label=\"Validation\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[2].set_title(f\"{model_name}: ROC-AUC\")\n",
        "    axes[2].set_xlabel(\"Epoch\")\n",
        "    axes[2].set_ylabel(\"ROC-AUC\")\n",
        "    axes[2].legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.savefig(\n",
        "        FIGURE_DIR / f\"{model_name}_training_history.png\",\n",
        "        dpi=300,\n",
        "        bbox_inches=\"tight\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "for model_name in [\n",
        "    \"DenseNet121\",\n",
        "    \"ResNet50\",\n",
        "    \"EfficientNetB0\"\n",
        "]:\n",
        "    plot_training_history(model_name)\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "v3cvTtbk3Vbh"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 34: GENERATE AND SAVE MODEL PREDICTIONS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def predict_and_save(model_name):\n",
        "\n",
        "    model_path = MODEL_DIR / f\"{model_name}_final.keras\"\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not model_path.exists():\n",
        "        raise FileNotFoundError(\n",
        "            f\"Model missing: {model_path}\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Loading:\", model_path)\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = keras.models.load_model(\n",
        "        model_path,\n",
        "        compile=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Predicting validation set...\")\n",
        "    val_probabilities = model.predict(\n",
        "        val_ds,\n",
        "        verbose=1\n",
        "    ).ravel()\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Predicting test set...\")\n",
        "    test_probabilities = model.predict(\n",
        "        test_ds,\n",
        "        verbose=1\n",
        "    ).ravel()\n",
        "\n",
        "    np.save(\n",
        "        PREDICTION_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{model_name}_validation_probabilities.npy\",\n",
        "        val_probabilities\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    np.save(\n",
        "        PREDICTION_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{model_name}_test_probabilities.npy\",\n",
        "        test_probabilities\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    del model\n",
        "    gc.collect()\n",
        "    tf.keras.backend.clear_session()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return val_probabilities, test_probabilities\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "m72IFI8f3dEu"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 35: OPTIMIZE SOFT-VOTING ENSEMBLE WEIGHTS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "y_val = val_df[\"label\"].values.astype(int)\n",
        "y_test = test_df[\"label\"].values.astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "validation_prediction_matrix = np.column_stack([\n",
        "    dense_val,\n",
        "    resnet_val,\n",
        "    effnet_val\n",
        "])\n",
        "\n",
        "test_prediction_matrix = np.column_stack([\n",
        "    dense_test,\n",
        "    resnet_test,\n",
        "    effnet_test\n",
        "])\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "def ensemble_log_loss(weights):\n",
        "\n",
        "    probabilities = (\n",
        "        validation_prediction_matrix @ weights\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    probabilities = np.clip(\n",
        "        probabilities,\n",
        "        1e-7,\n",
        "        1 - 1e-7\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    loss = -np.mean(\n",
        "        y_val * np.log(probabilities)\n",
        "        + (1 - y_val) * np.log(1 - probabilities)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return loss\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "initial_weights = np.array([\n",
        "    1/3,\n",
        "    1/3,\n",
        "    1/3\n",
        "])\n",
        "\n",
        "constraints = {\n",
        "    \"type\": \"eq\",\n",
        "    \"fun\": lambda weights: np.sum(weights) - 1\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "bounds = [\n",
        "    (0.0, 1.0),\n",
        "    (0.0, 1.0),\n",
        "    (0.0, 1.0)\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "optimization_result = minimize(\n",
        "    ensemble_log_loss,\n",
        "    initial_weights,\n",
        "    method=\"SLSQP\",\n",
        "    bounds=bounds,\n",
        "    constraints=constraints\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "if optimization_result.success:\n",
        "    ensemble_weights = optimization_result.x\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Optimization failed. Using equal weights.\")\n",
        "    ensemble_weights = initial_weights\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"DenseNet121 weight:\", ensemble_weights[0])\n",
        "print(\"ResNet50 weight:\", ensemble_weights[1])\n",
        "print(\"EfficientNetB0 weight:\", ensemble_weights[2])\n",
        "print(\"Weight sum:\", ensemble_weights.sum())\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "ZrYBOu963kex"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "ensemble_weight_data = {\n",
        "    \"DenseNet121\": float(ensemble_weights[0]),\n",
        "    \"ResNet50\": float(ensemble_weights[1]),\n",
        "    \"EfficientNetB0\": float(ensemble_weights[2])\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "with open(\n",
        "    TABLE_DIR / \"ensemble_weights.json\",\n",
        "    \"w\"\n",
        ") as file:\n",
        "    json.dump(\n",
        "        ensemble_weight_data,\n",
        "        file,\n",
        "        indent=4\n",
        "    )\n"
      ],

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 37: VALIDATION-BASED THRESHOLD SELECTION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "threshold_candidates = np.arange(\n",
        "    0.05,\n",
        "    0.951,\n",
        "    0.01\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "threshold_results = []\n",
        "\n",
        "for threshold in threshold_candidates:\n",
        "\n",
        "    predictions = (\n",
        "        ensemble_val_probabilities >= threshold\n",
        "    ).astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "    tn, fp, fn, tp = confusion_matrix(\n",
        "        y_val,\n",
        "        predictions,\n",
        "        labels=[0, 1]\n",
        "    ).ravel()\n",
        "\n",
        "    sensitivity = (\n",
        "        tp / (tp + fn)\n",
        "        if (tp + fn) > 0\n",
        "        else 0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    specificity = (\n",
        "        tn / (tn + fp)\n",
        "        if (tn + fp) > 0\n",
        "        else 0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    threshold_results.append({\n",
        "        \"threshold\": threshold,\n",
        "        \"f1_score\": f1_score(\n",
        "            y_val,\n",
        "            predictions,\n",
        "            zero_division=0\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"sensitivity\": sensitivity,\n",
        "        \"specificity\": specificity,\n",
        "        \"youden_index\": sensitivity + specificity - 1\n",
        "    })\n",
        "\n",
        "threshold_df = pd.DataFrame(threshold_results)\n",
        "\n",
        "best_row = threshold_df.loc[\n",
        "    threshold_df[\"f1_score\"].idxmax()\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "OPTIMAL_THRESHOLD = float(\n",
        "    best_row[\"threshold\"]\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Selected threshold:\", OPTIMAL_THRESHOLD)\n",
        "print(best_row)\n",
        "\n",
        "threshold_df.to_csv(\n",
        "    TABLE_DIR / \"threshold_analysis.csv\",\n",
        "    index=False\n",
        ")\n"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 38: COMPREHENSIVE BINARY CLASSIFICATION METRICS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def calculate_metrics(\n",
        "    y_true,\n",
        "    probabilities,\n",
        "    threshold=0.5\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    predictions = (\n",
        "        probabilities >= threshold\n",
        "    ).astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "    tn, fp, fn, tp = confusion_matrix(\n",
        "        y_true,\n",
        "        predictions,\n",
        "        labels=[0, 1]\n",
        "    ).ravel()\n",
        "\n",
        "    sensitivity = (\n",
        "        tp / (tp + fn)\n",
        "        if (tp + fn) > 0\n",
        "        else 0.0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    specificity = (\n",
        "        tn / (tn + fp)\n",
        "        if (tn + fp) > 0\n",
        "        else 0.0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    npv = (\n",
        "        tn / (tn + fn)\n",
        "        if (tn + fn) > 0\n",
        "        else 0.0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    metrics = {\n",
        "        \"threshold\": threshold,\n",
        "        \"accuracy\": accuracy_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            predictions\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"balanced_accuracy\": balanced_accuracy_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            predictions\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"precision_ppv\": precision_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            predictions,\n",
        "            zero_division=0\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"sensitivity_recall\": sensitivity,\n",
        "        \"specificity\": specificity,\n",
        "        \"negative_predictive_value\": npv,\n",
        "        \"f1_score\": f1_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            predictions,\n",
        "            zero_division=0\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"roc_auc\": roc_auc_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            probabilities\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"average_precision\": average_precision_score(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            probabilities\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"matthews_correlation\": matthews_corrcoef(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            predictions\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"brier_score\": brier_score_loss(\n",
        "            y_true,\n",
        "            probabilities\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        \"true_negative\": int(tn),\n",
        "        \"false_positive\": int(fp),\n",
        "        \"false_negative\": int(fn),\n",
        "        \"true_positive\": int(tp)\n",
        "    }\n",
        "\n",
        "    return metrics, predictions\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "r_D4tOr_4CeC"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },

      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 44: BOOTSTRAP 95% CONFIDENCE INTERVALS\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def bootstrap_confidence_intervals(\n",
        "    y_true,\n",
        "    probabilities,\n",
        "    threshold,\n",
        "    number_of_bootstraps=1000,\n",
        "    confidence_level=0.95,\n",
        "    seed=SEED\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)\n",
        "\n",
        "    bootstrap_results = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    y_true = np.asarray(y_true)\n",
        "    probabilities = np.asarray(probabilities)\n",
        "\n",
        "    n_samples = len(y_true)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for _ in range(number_of_bootstraps):\n",
        "\n",
        "        sampled_indices = rng.integers(\n",
        "            0,\n",
        "            n_samples,\n",
        "            n_samples\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        sampled_y = y_true[sampled_indices]\n",
        "        sampled_probabilities = probabilities[\n",
        "            sampled_indices\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "\n",
        "        # ROC-AUC requires both classes\n",
        "        if len(np.unique(sampled_y)) < 2:\n",
        "            continue\n",
        "\n",
        "        metrics, _ = calculate_metrics(\n",
        "            sampled_y,\n",
        "            sampled_probabilities,\n",
        "            threshold\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        bootstrap_results.append({\n",
        "            \"accuracy\": metrics[\"accuracy\"],\n",
        "            \"precision\": metrics[\"precision_ppv\"],\n",
        "            \"sensitivity\": metrics[\"sensitivity_recall\"],\n",
        "            \"specificity\": metrics[\"specificity\"],\n",
        "            \"f1_score\": metrics[\"f1_score\"],\n",
        "            \"roc_auc\": metrics[\"roc_auc\"]\n",
        "        })\n",
        "\n",
        "    bootstrap_df = pd.DataFrame(\n",
        "        bootstrap_results\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    alpha = 1 - confidence_level\n",
        "\n",
        "    summary_rows = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    for metric in bootstrap_df.columns:\n",
        "\n",
        "        lower = bootstrap_df[metric].quantile(\n",
        "            alpha / 2\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        upper = bootstrap_df[metric].quantile(\n",
        "            1 - alpha / 2\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        point_estimate = ensemble_metrics[\n",
        "            {\n",
        "                \"precision\": \"precision_ppv\",\n",
        "                \"sensitivity\": \"sensitivity_recall\"\n",
        "            }.get(metric, metric)\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "\n",
        "        summary_rows.append({\n",
        "            \"metric\": metric,\n",
        "            \"point_estimate\": point_estimate,\n",
        "            \"ci_lower\": lower,\n",
        "            \"ci_upper\": upper\n",
        "        })\n",
        "\n",
        "    return pd.DataFrame(summary_rows)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "bootstrap_summary = bootstrap_confidence_intervals(\n",
        "    y_true=y_test,\n",
        "    probabilities=ensemble_test_probabilities,\n",
        "    threshold=OPTIMAL_THRESHOLD,\n",
        "    number_of_bootstraps=1000\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "display(bootstrap_summary.round(4))\n",
        "\n",
        "bootstrap_summary.to_csv(\n",
        "    TABLE_DIR /\n",
        "    \"ensemble_bootstrap_confidence_intervals.csv\",\n",
        "    index=False\n",
        ")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cnnfViHy4Z1x"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },

      "cell_type": "code",

      "outputs": []

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 46: FIND LAST 4D CONVOLUTIONAL OUTPUT\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def find_last_spatial_layer(model):\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Search recursively because the ImageNet model is nested\n",
        "    candidate_layers = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    def inspect_layers(layer_collection):\n",
        "        for layer in layer_collection:\n",
        "\n",
        "            if isinstance(layer, keras.Model):\n",
        "                inspect_layers(layer.layers)\n",
        "\n",
        "            try:\n",
        "                output_shape = layer.output.shape\n",
        "\n",
        "                if len(output_shape) == 4:\n",
        "                    candidate_layers.append(layer)\n",
        "\n",
        "            except Exception:\n",
        "                pass\n",
        "\n",
        "    inspect_layers(model.layers)\n",
        "\n",
        "    if not candidate_layers:\n",
        "        raise ValueError(\n",
        "            \"No four-dimensional spatial layer was found.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return candidate_layers[-1]\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "9Bv7Srh04Zib"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 47: CREATE GRAD-CAM HEATMAP\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def make_gradcam_heatmap(\n",
        "    image_batch,\n",
        "    model,\n",
        "    target_class=1\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    target_layer = find_last_spatial_layer(model)\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Grad-CAM target layer:\", target_layer.name)\n",
        "\n",
        "    grad_model = keras.Model(\n",
        "        inputs=model.inputs,\n",
        "        outputs=[\n",
        "            target_layer.output,\n",
        "            model.output\n",
        "        ]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    with tf.GradientTape() as tape:\n",
        "\n",
        "        convolutional_output, prediction = grad_model(\n",
        "            image_batch,\n",
        "            training=False\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        pneumonia_score = prediction[:, 0]\n",
        "\n",
        "        if target_class == 1:\n",
        "            class_score = pneumonia_score\n",
        "        else:\n",
        "            class_score = 1.0 - pneumonia_score\n",
        "\n",
        "    gradients = tape.gradient(\n",
        "        class_score,\n",
        "        convolutional_output\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    if gradients is None:\n",
        "        raise RuntimeError(\n",
        "            \"Gradients are None. Check the model and target layer.\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    pooled_gradients = tf.reduce_mean(\n",
        "        gradients,\n",
        "        axis=(0, 1, 2)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    feature_maps = convolutional_output[0]\n",
        "\n",
        "    heatmap = tf.reduce_sum(\n",
        "        feature_maps * pooled_gradients,\n",
        "        axis=-1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    heatmap = tf.nn.relu(heatmap)\n",
        "\n",
        "    maximum = tf.reduce_max(heatmap)\n",
        "\n",
        "    heatmap = tf.where(\n",
        "        maximum > 0,\n",
        "        heatmap / (maximum + tf.keras.backend.epsilon()),\n",
        "        heatmap\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return heatmap.numpy()\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "uU94SnK04Yhx"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 48: IMAGE PREPARATION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def prepare_single_xray(image_path):\n",
        "\n",
        "    image_bytes = tf.io.read_file(\n",
        "        image_path\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.io.decode_image(\n",
        "        image_bytes,\n",
        "        channels=3,\n",
        "        expand_animations=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image.set_shape([None, None, 3])\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.image.resize(\n",
        "        image,\n",
        "        [IMG_HEIGHT, IMG_WIDTH],\n",
        "        antialias=True\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image = tf.cast(\n",
        "        image,\n",
        "        tf.float32\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    image_batch = tf.expand_dims(\n",
        "        image,\n",
        "        axis=0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return image.numpy(), image_batch\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "VB7wigBw4YXV"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 49: GRAD-CAM VISUALIZATION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def create_gradcam_overlay(\n",
        "    original_rgb,\n",
        "    heatmap,\n",
        "    alpha_max=0.55,\n",
        "    threshold=0.45\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    height, width = original_rgb.shape[:2]\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmap = cv2.resize(\n",
        "        heatmap,\n",
        "        (width, height),\n",
        "        interpolation=cv2.INTER_CUBIC\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmap = cv2.GaussianBlur(\n",
        "        resized_heatmap,\n",
        "        (11, 11),\n",
        "        sigmaX=0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmap = np.clip(\n",
        "        resized_heatmap,\n",
        "        0,\n",
        "        1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    heatmap_uint8 = np.uint8(\n",
        "        255 * resized_heatmap\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    color_map_bgr = cv2.applyColorMap(\n",
        "        heatmap_uint8,\n",
        "        cv2.COLORMAP_TURBO\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    color_map_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(\n",
        "        color_map_bgr,\n",
        "        cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    alpha = (\n",
        "        resized_heatmap[..., np.newaxis]\n",
        "        * alpha_max\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    original_float = original_rgb.astype(\n",
        "        np.float32\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    overlay = (\n",
        "        original_float * (1 - alpha)\n",
        "        + color_map_rgb.astype(np.float32) * alpha\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    overlay = np.clip(\n",
        "        overlay,\n",
        "        0,\n",
        "        255\n",
        "    ).astype(np.uint8)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Optional contours of strongly activated areas\n",
        "    binary_mask = (\n",
        "        resized_heatmap >= threshold\n",
        "    ).astype(np.uint8) * 255\n",
        "\n",
        "    contours, _ = cv2.findContours(\n",
        "        binary_mask,\n",
        "        cv2.RETR_EXTERNAL,\n",
        "        cv2.CHAIN_APPROX_SIMPLE\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    contour_overlay = overlay.copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "    cv2.drawContours(\n",
        "        contour_overlay,\n",
        "        contours,\n",
        "        -1,\n",
        "        color=(0, 255, 0),\n",
        "        thickness=2\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    return (\n",
        "        resized_heatmap,\n",
        "        overlay,\n",
        "        contour_overlay\n",
        "    )\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "KssTy0Di4zTU"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 50: SINGLE-MODEL GRAD-CAM EXPLANATION\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def explain_one_image(\n",
        "    image_path,\n",
        "    model_name,\n",
        "    true_class=None,\n",
        "    save_name=None\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    model_path = (\n",
        "        MODEL_DIR /\n",
        "        f\"{model_name}_final.keras\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    model = keras.models.load_model(\n",
        "        model_path,\n",
        "        compile=False\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    original_rgb, image_batch = (\n",
        "        prepare_single_xray(image_path)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    probability = float(\n",
        "        model.predict(\n",
        "            image_batch,\n",
        "            verbose=0\n",
        "        )[0, 0]\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    predicted_class = (\n",
        "        1 if probability >= 0.5 else 0\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    predicted_label = (\n",
        "        \"PNEUMONIA\"\n",
        "        if predicted_class == 1\n",
        "        else \"NORMAL\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    confidence = (\n",
        "        probability\n",
        "        if predicted_class == 1\n",
        "        else 1 - probability\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    heatmap = make_gradcam_heatmap(\n",
        "        image_batch=image_batch,\n",
        "        model=model,\n",
        "        target_class=predicted_class\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmap, overlay, contour_overlay = (\n",
        "        create_gradcam_overlay(\n",
        "            original_rgb=original_rgb,\n",
        "            heatmap=heatmap\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(\n",
        "        1,\n",
        "        4,\n",
        "        figsize=(20, 5)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[0].imshow(\n",
        "        original_rgb.astype(np.uint8)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    axes[0].set_title(\"Original Chest X-Ray\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    activation_plot = axes[1].imshow(\n",
        "        resized_heatmap,\n",
        "        cmap=\"turbo\",\n",
        "        vmin=0,\n",
        "        vmax=1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    axes[1].set_title(\"Grad-CAM Activation\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[2].imshow(overlay)\n",
        "    axes[2].set_title(\"Smooth Grad-CAM Overlay\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[3].imshow(contour_overlay)\n",
        "    axes[3].set_title(\"High-Activation Contours\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    for axis in axes:\n",
        "        axis.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    truth_text = (\n",
        "        f\" | True: {true_class}\"\n",
        "        if true_class is not None\n",
        "        else \"\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig.suptitle(\n",
        "        (\n",
        "            f\"{model_name} | Prediction: {predicted_label} | \"\n",
        "            f\"Confidence: {confidence:.2%}{truth_text}\"\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        fontsize=15,\n",
        "        fontweight=\"bold\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    colorbar = fig.colorbar(\n",
        "        activation_plot,\n",
        "        ax=axes,\n",
        "        fraction=0.018,\n",
        "        pad=0.02\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    colorbar.set_label(\n",
        "        \"Relative Grad-CAM importance\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    if save_name is None:\n",
        "        save_name = (\n",
        "            f\"{model_name}_{Path(image_path).stem}_gradcam.png\"\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.savefig(\n",
        "        XAI_DIR / save_name,\n",
        "        dpi=300,\n",
        "        bbox_inches=\"tight\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    del model\n",
        "    gc.collect()\n",
        "    tf.keras.backend.clear_session()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"model\": model_name,\n",
        "        \"probability\": probability,\n",
        "        \"predicted_class\": predicted_label,\n",
        "        \"confidence\": confidence\n",
        "    }\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "j4ZXcXk04zNH"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "correct_pneumonia_cases = prediction_df[\n",
        "    (prediction_df[\"label\"] == 1)\n",
        "    & (prediction_df[\"correct\"])\n",
        "]\n",
        "\n",
        "if len(correct_pneumonia_cases) > 0:\n",
        "\n",
        "    sample_row = correct_pneumonia_cases.iloc[0]\n",
        "\n",
        "    result = explain_one_image(\n",
        "        image_path=sample_row[\"filepath\"],\n",
        "        model_name=\"DenseNet121\",\n",
        "        true_class=sample_row[\"label_name\"],\n",
        "        save_name=\"densenet_correct_pneumonia_gradcam.png\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(result)\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "CwOJzl3M4zEd"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "# CELL 51: WEIGHTED ENSEMBLE GRAD-CAM\n",
        "# ============================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "def create_ensemble_gradcam(\n",
        "    image_path,\n",
        "    true_class=None,\n",
        "    save_name=\"ensemble_gradcam.png\"\n",
        "):\n",
        "\n",
        "    model_names = [\n",
        "        \"DenseNet121\",\n",
        "        \"ResNet50\",\n",
        "        \"EfficientNetB0\"\n",
        "    ]\n",
        "\n",
        "    original_rgb, image_batch = (\n",
        "        prepare_single_xray(image_path)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    probabilities = []\n",
        "    heatmaps = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    # First obtain prediction probabilities\n",
        "    for model_name in model_names:\n",
        "\n",
        "        model = keras.models.load_model(\n",
        "            MODEL_DIR /\n",
        "            f\"{model_name}_final.keras\",\n",
        "            compile=False\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        probability = float(\n",
        "            model.predict(\n",
        "                image_batch,\n",
        "                verbose=0\n",
        "            )[0, 0]\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        probabilities.append(\n",
        "            probability\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        del model\n",
        "        gc.collect()\n",
        "        tf.keras.backend.clear_session()\n",
        "\n",
        "    probabilities = np.asarray(\n",
        "        probabilities\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    ensemble_probability = float(\n",
        "        probabilities @ ensemble_weights\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    predicted_class = int(\n",
        "        ensemble_probability\n",
        "        >= OPTIMAL_THRESHOLD\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    predicted_label = (\n",
        "        \"PNEUMONIA\"\n",
        "        if predicted_class == 1\n",
        "        else \"NORMAL\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Generate class-consistent heatmap from each model\n",
        "    for model_name in model_names:\n",
        "\n",
        "        model = keras.models.load_model(\n",
        "            MODEL_DIR /\n",
        "            f\"{model_name}_final.keras\",\n",
        "            compile=False\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        heatmap = make_gradcam_heatmap(\n",
        "            image_batch=image_batch,\n",
        "            model=model,\n",
        "            target_class=predicted_class\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "        heatmaps.append(heatmap)\n",
        "\n",
        "        del model\n",
        "        gc.collect()\n",
        "        tf.keras.backend.clear_session()\n",
        "\n",
        "    target_height = IMG_HEIGHT\n",
        "    target_width = IMG_WIDTH\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmaps = []\n",
        "\n",
        "    for heatmap in heatmaps:\n",
        "        resized = cv2.resize(\n",
        "            heatmap,\n",
        "            (target_width, target_height),\n",
        "            interpolation=cv2.INTER_CUBIC\n",
        "        )\n",
        "        resized_heatmaps.append(resized)\n",
        "\n",
        "    weighted_heatmap = np.zeros(\n",
        "        (target_height, target_width),\n",
        "        dtype=np.float32\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    for weight, heatmap in zip(\n",
        "        ensemble_weights,\n",
        "        resized_heatmaps\n",
        "    ):\n",
        "        weighted_heatmap += weight * heatmap\n",
        "\n",
        "    if weighted_heatmap.max() > 0:\n",
        "        weighted_heatmap /= weighted_heatmap.max()\n",
        "\n",
        "    resized_heatmap, overlay, contour_overlay = (\n",
        "        create_gradcam_overlay(\n",
        "            original_rgb=original_rgb,\n",
        "            heatmap=weighted_heatmap\n",
        "        )\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(\n",
        "        1,\n",
        "        4,\n",
        "        figsize=(20, 5)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[0].imshow(\n",
        "        original_rgb.astype(np.uint8)\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    axes[0].set_title(\"Original Chest X-Ray\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    activation_plot = axes[1].imshow(\n",
        "        resized_heatmap,\n",
        "        cmap=\"turbo\",\n",
        "        vmin=0,\n",
        "        vmax=1\n",
        "    )\n",
        "    axes[1].set_title(\"Weighted Ensemble Grad-CAM\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[2].imshow(overlay)\n",
        "    axes[2].set_title(\"Clinical Review Overlay\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    axes[3].imshow(contour_overlay)\n",
        "    axes[3].set_title(\"High-Activation Contours\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    for axis in axes:\n",
        "        axis.axis(\"off\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    truth_text = (\n",
        "        f\" | True: {true_class}\"\n",
        "        if true_class is not None\n",
        "        else \"\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig.suptitle(\n",
        "        (\n",
        "            f\"Ensemble prediction: {predicted_label} | \"\n",
        "            f\"Pneumonia probability: {ensemble_probability:.2%}\"\n",
        "            f\"{truth_text}\"\n",
        "        ),\n",
        "        fontsize=15,\n",
        "        fontweight=\"bold\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    colorbar = fig.colorbar(\n",
        "        activation_plot,\n",
        "        ax=axes,\n",
        "        fraction=0.018,\n",
        "        pad=0.02\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    colorbar.set_label(\n",
        "        \"Relative ensemble Grad-CAM importance\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.savefig(\n",
        "        XAI_DIR / save_name,\n",
        "        dpi=300,\n",
        "        bbox_inches=\"tight\"\n",
        "    )\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return {\n",
        "        \"DenseNet121_probability\": probabilities[0],\n",
        "        \"ResNet50_probability\": probabilities[1],\n",
        "        \"EfficientNetB0_probability\": probabilities[2],\n",
        "        \"ensemble_probability\": ensemble_probability,\n",
        "        \"predicted_class\": predicted_label\n",
        "    }\n"
